name: Barbecue Chicken Drumsticks with Spicy Dips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the ingredients for Hot Horseradish Dip. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve. Repeat the process for Mustard Dip.
2. Prepare the grill by placing coals on one side and heating them until they are ash white. Place an aluminum foil drip pan opposite the hot coals.
3. Place the chicken on the grill over the drip pan. Grill, turning occasionally, for 7 minutes.
4. Continue grilling, basting occasionally with barbecue sauce, until the chicken is fork tender (6-8 minutes).
5. Serve the chicken hot or cold with the dips. TIP: Substitute 4 pounds of chicken wing drumettes for 24 chicken drumsticks. Serve as an appetizer.
